prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: DETERMINATION OF LOCAL PROTEIN STRUCTURE BY SPIN LABEL DIFFERENCE 2D NMR: THE REGION NEIGHBORING ASP61 OF SUBUNIT C OF THE F1FO ATP SYNTHASE. Entity description: F1F0 ATP SYNTHASE (SUBUNIT C). Entry keywords: MEMBRANE PROTEIN MEMBRANE PROTEIN. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
